overview: AI-powered interior design platform for small spaces in the USA. Upload a room photo, get three AI-styled design variations (Modern, Minimalist, Luxury), and save or share your favorite to Pinterest or Instagram. Built with a luxury glassmorphism aesthetic, dark/light mode, and full mobile responsiveness.
features: AI Design Studio with 3 style variations
Room image upload with demo AI results
Save and share designs to Pinterest/Instagram
Luxury glassmorphism UI with dark/light mode
